spec1.title: 1. Structure

textW.px: : RCC Framed structure designed for seismic compliant
:  Wire cut red bricks wall for internal & external
: Will be maintained at 3000mm
: Finished with 2 coats of putty, 1 coat of primer & 2 coats of premium emulsion
: Finished with 2 coats of putty, 1 coat of primer & 2 coats of premium emulsion
: Exterior faces of the building finished with texture&1 coat of primer & 2 coats of exterior Emulsion paint with color as per architect’s design
: Glazed/Matte ceramic wall tiles up to false ceiling height
: Glazed/Matte ceramic wall tiles up to false ceiling height
: Glazed/Matte ceramic wall tiles up to7 feet height
: Grid type false ceiling
: Double Charged Polished vitrified tiles
: Double Charged Polished vitrified tiles
: Double Charged Polished Vitrified Tiles
: Vitrified tiles
: Anti-skid ceramic tiles
: Anti-skid ceramic tiles
: Open Kitchen
: For chimney, HOB & water purifier
: Parryware/Jaguar OR equivalent
: SS sink with drain board
: Counter mounted wash basin wherever applicable
: Glass Railing as per architect’s design
: Parryware/Jaguar OR equivalent
: Parryware/Jaguar OR equivalent
:Single lever diverter, hand shower, Rain shower & counter mounted wash basin
: Teak wood frame & shutter with veneer panelling on both sides
: African teak wood frame & double side laminated door Ironmongeries like tower bolt, and Magnetic catcher.
: African teak wood frame of double side laminated door. Ironmongeries like one side coin & thumb turn lock without key, tower bolt and door bush
: UPVC windows with sliding shutter with see-through plain glass and MS grill on the inner side (wherever applicable)
: UPVC windows and doors with toughened glass without grill
: UPVC of fixed louvered / open-able shutter for ODU access (wherever applicable)
: 3 PHASE power supply connection plain
: MCB & ELCB (Earth leak age Circuit breaker)
:Modular box & modular switches & sockets of Schneider or equivalent will be provided
: Fire Retardant Low Smoke (FRLS) copper wire of a quality is brand Finolexor equivalent will be provided
: Point in Living & Master Bedroom and provision in other bedrooms
: Point in Living & Master Bedroom
: Point in Living & Master Bedroom
: Points will be given in the living / Dining and all bedrooms
: Point will be given in all bathrooms
: Geyser points will be provided in all bathrooms
: 100% Back up for all the Units

spec3.title: COMMON FEATURES:
spec3.p1: : Elevators of 8 passenger automatic lift will be provided.
spec3.p3: The apartment owner name will be provided in the stilt floor
spec3.p5: : Granite flooring As per Architect suggestion
spec3.p6: : Granite flooring As per Architect suggestion
spec3.p8: : MS handrail with enamel paint finish in all floors

spec3.title: OUTDOOR FEATURES:
spec3.p1: : UG Sump for Rain Water Storage. WTP Provision at Terrace and Treated water will be stored in OHT
spec3.p4: : CCTV surveillance cameras will be provided all-round the building at pivotal Locations in ground level
spec3.p5: : Walkway spaces well defined as per landscape design intent
spec3.p6: : Security booth will be provided at the entrance
spec3.p7: : Site perimeter fenced by compound wall with entry gates for a height of 1500mm as per design intent
spec3.p8: : Suitable landscape at appropriate places in the project as per design intent
spec3.p9: : Convex mirror for safe turning in driveway in / out
spec3.p10: :Interlocking paver block/equiva lent flooring with a demarcated driveway as per Architect design intent
